_comment: Per-cell provenance registry for the coverage matrix (Wave 4 spec 5.4) - reviewed data file. live-verified = the grounding property shape was observed on a live tenant; documented-only = Microsoft Learn documents the shape but it has not been probed live, so the cell renders the provisional marker until TEST-day verification (see docs/testday-activation.md). Column-level entries apply to every row in that column unless a row override exists.

dlp.grounding: Per-location properties on Get-DlpCompliancePolicy (ExchangeLocation, SharePointLocation, OneDriveLocation, TeamsLocation, EndpointDlpLocation, PowerBIDlpLocation + *LocationException) - on the verified property list; Copilot row via VERIFIED EnforcementPlanes/Locations signals (2026-07-02 sandbox).

autoLabel.grounding: Get-AutoSensitivityLabelPolicy location properties (ExchangeLocation, SharePointLocation, OneDriveLocation + exceptions) - documented, not yet observed live.

retention.grounding: Get-RetentionCompliancePolicy location properties (ExchangeLocation, SharePointLocation, OneDriveLocation, ModernGroupLocation, TeamsChannelLocation, TeamsChatLocation) - documented, projection marked best-effort since Wave 1.
